scripts.dev:all: frontend\node_modules\.bin\concurrently.cmd -k -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm.cmd run dev:backend" "npm.cmd run dev:frontend"
scripts.package:win: npm.cmd run build:backend && npm.cmd --prefix frontend run package:win
scripts.dist:win: npm.cmd run build:backend && npm.cmd --prefix frontend run dist:win
